name: Blocks 8
author: Poki
description: Blocks 8 is a puzzle game inspired by the classic Tetris. The goal is simple: fill a row or column with the available blocks to score points! Unlike traditional Tetris, you can drag and drop the blocks freely to position them in the best way possible. Strategically place the pieces to clear as many rows and columns as you can at once for higher scores. With unlimited possibilities and creative freedom, it's all about how you use your logic to achieve the ultimate high score. Can you beat your best record? How to play Blocks 8? Click and drag blocks to move them freely around the grid. Who created Blocks 8? Blocks 8 is created by Onduck Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Blocks 8 for free? You can play Blocks 8 for free on Poki. Can I play Blocks 8 on mobile devices and desktop? Blocks 8 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
